textByHash.02f6277c51759bdb2e6dca8c84b3857f9f369854: Well it suits my purpose nearly as much as yours if the blackjack seller produces a wider variety of wares.
textByHash.04a17d206e05e23b9adc0ed87d631e52a6d6e5e9: Well do you need any other information then?
textByHash.08173dd1f548ed7a63644aa9cfbbc9273d209b69: Better a thief than a liar!
textByHash.1d0424df0617bccc75fe0dcaed53a718cb6eb704: Operator'. I reckon they're up to something, but they're such a close knit group that little ever slips out.
textByHash.3635210d836126b6fbeebcbeead4c70eed5bd10b: Hey you, camel features! Come here.
textByHash.3d4299a23f05b6f6c50bf39ebe5d47481c9a72e3: I'm not little and if you say that again I'll gut you.
textByHash.411259228134dd378dd16020331d0d683467b9e8: Pity, maybe we can do it again sometime.
textByHash.47f1d62f32d0e56dc9cbb909709697a19fa7cad4: Seeing as you owe me from the last bit of work we did together this is going to cost you 300 gold.
textByHash.49ea2b20de1a631ea17ddc3d7748a31588773800: Hey there I heard that you were trying to get the blackjack man to change his gear.
textByHash.4c028e42e6976c6685bdff88d5abdae5caecb0e7: Okay, I see them. Here I go!
textByHash.502e756414b219cb5de3d670c52b584e06d164be: Word has it that you're trying to get the blackjack man to change his kit.
textByHash.526347df91fcbef00bb593cbb83c21c5172b7bf0: It's boring! We're not as big as Menaphos or as powerful as Al Kharid, and we've got a really nasty crime problem. It's no wonder so many grown-ups have left.
textByHash.56d00cc3eb7ff301949262cf7cb7bb4c010fb6b0: There's not much to say, really. They're just a group of local thugs led by the biggest and strongest amongst them. If they have any other plans, I don't know about it.
textByHash.6719ea3bdfd85b6a029cc2cd1cbdc088211dc4cf: They're a bad bunch, always starting fights down in the Asp and Snake. Word on the street is that they're led by some deranged priest. Nobody's ever seen them though - they do all their deals through Ali 'the
textByHash.684e9e347461ffc13d7d378deaf883c64fbc481b: Barely, the trick is in moving with the blow.
textByHash.6b50977aec5e645b9ea383cd403fa5e924ca79ac: Now walk up to the merchant, engage him in conversation and leave the rest up to me.
textByHash.6bef744b577b2e6c672edb7b6cb0fc0b6fae1260: Do you need any other information?
textByHash.712ac546290fe35198f0dfb8f279e08303bde1d3: He disappeared a little while ago. All I know is it had something to do with the gangs. Probably he scammed them. You'd have to gain their trust to find out more, m'afraid - if I get too close, they might disappear me
textByHash.77384ef93a5642dad82e796beab693096152db57: No one knows what's going on in the streets better than me. I live, sleep, eat and drink here. The fact that I'm so small means that people tend to ignore me which helps even more.
textByHash.89720782035bec1309833231e5d54fa0d3d839eb: Hi! Do you want to go rob some more people? I could do with some more money.
textByHash.8db96d77d256fb015d7fbce014561fa89f86947b: Do you forget who you're talking to? I'm the fastest and sneakiest urchin in this town.
textByHash.930ab574025f5a923bff86ce170fc0102d1b39b3: of local thugs to drive them out, but they saw how weak he was and turned on us too. Now we've got bandits and Menaphites, and the mayor isn't doing anything!
textByHash.9b269aee828ca302af7a1f18817e041140bb9cd2: Listen, you're crazy. I can't see anyone to distract.
textByHash.ab6571bb01d4dbb3764ac1d422dd2a2fd87b93b2: Ya he nearly did. Boyo, does my head still hurt.
textByHash.b182f42ed4ab9288cb8361ca4c6b4dfd5a6754a8: Well do you need any information then?
textByHash.b4f5619cb7eae7a3872c13b36ec374f5da8e6f12: The mayor is a spineless coward! He never stands up to anybody. That's why the Menaphites are so strong now! He let them stay, and then they started causing trouble. When he realised his mistake, he hired a band
textByHash.b8b6f8d235db9dc5d0ea1ff665ca26779f4674a6: Well chances are, he'll produce some even higher quality items for me to steal
textByHash.ced4a84687d61a551dfa8ce30523db5669320472: I'll let you off this once. Well what do you want? Information?
textByHash.da96e220b72acea980c75e34fba588368d4ca3d7: Did you see the way I distracted that guy? Man, I'm one smooth operator!
textByHash.df651015293a149058060724fbf083535436f145: Thanks sir, I didn't think you would hold up your side of the deal. There's not much honour amongst thieves, you know.
textByHash.ed62980f775283199be2dcdb108dbe89486db512: Come back if you need any info about anything in the town.
textByHash.ee4608e21d21b3e2fc8ea976abcab4f0538ee774: Hah! Did you see the face on the blackjack seller! Ha boyo! I had to move quick to get out of the way of his blackjack.
textByHash.eeee3b611242887777de211bed2412126aa3b43d: I know him! He used to kick us when he caught any of us stealing from his stall.
textByHash.f18091d92398d76a18e49faaf76b91ad4f7ae5c1: Don't play stupid with me, I'm better at it. Where's my money?
textByHash.f45514cec805c1f6275c3a2adee7fce8f9314ba5: Seeing as we've worked successfully together in the past I will only charge you 100 gold.
textByHash.f7d560045e3e3ee41786ccf904127cfcf4b46782: Give me double and I'll be quiet!
